prompt.content: Act as a direct LLM coordinator without a symbolic authorization boundary. Interpret the request, fill the evidence-grounded semantic fields, decide accept or refuse, assign admitted agents to all required capabilities, and provide dependency-respecting capability execution_order. Copy exact request evidence for semantic choices. Use only supplied identifiers. Return JSON only.

terminal_goals.evidence_text: The source material for the travel logistics work has been collected and assembled into a structured bundle.
The assembled travel logistics packet has been verified for correctness and is now in a checked state.
The checked final brief has been successfully published as both JSON and signed PDF documents.
The checked travel logistics brief has been archived for long-term retention in a structured JSON format.
